names: [15 names. Diverse cultures/eras. Other dead people trapped here.]

calm: [6 lines. Calm — newly arrived or holding together. Muttered, not to you. Dark Souls vibe: cryptic, resigned.]
anxious: [6 lines. Anxious — starting to crack. Repetitive, strained, still coherent.]
mad: [6 lines. Mad — broken. Ranting, nonsensical, aggressive fragments.]
catatonic: [4 lines. Catatonic — barely there. Single words, trailing off, almost not language.]
dead: [3 lines. Dead NPC body. They resurrect at dawn. Not gory.]
